class_name CombatEventBus
extends Node
## 战斗事件总线 — 全局发布/订阅
## 
## 用法：
##   发射方: CombatEventBus.emit(CombatEvent.create(ON_HIT, caster, target))
##   订阅方: CombatEventBus.subscribe(CombatEvent.Type.ON_KILL, func(ev): ...)
## 
## 原则：
##   - 单例：每个场景一个实例，通过 static instance 访问
##   - 订阅者不修改事件（事件是已发生的事实）
##   - 回调中抛异常不会中断其他订阅者

## ── 全局静态访问 ──
static var instance: CombatEventBus = null

## 当前事件发射深度（防递归爆炸，TriggeredEffect.max_recursion 引用）
static var _emit_depth: int = 0

## 硬上限（不可绕过）
const MAX_DEPTH_HARD: int = 5


## ── 订阅表 ──
## key = CombatEvent.Type (int), value = Array[Callable]
var _listeners: Dictionary = {}


func _ready() -> void:
	instance = self


func _exit_tree() -> void:
	if instance == self:
		instance = null


## ── 订阅 ──

func subscribe(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	if not _listeners.has(event_type):
		_listeners[event_type] = []
	var arr: Array = _listeners[event_type]
	if callback not in arr:
		arr.append(callback)


func unsubscribe(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	if not _listeners.has(event_type):
		return
	var arr: Array = _listeners[event_type]
	arr.erase(callback)


## 一次性订阅（触发后自动移除）
func once(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	var wrapper: Callable = func(ev: CombatEvent):
		unsubscribe(event_type, wrapper)
		callback.call(ev)
	subscribe(event_type, wrapper)


## ── 发射 ──

func emit(ev: CombatEvent) -> void:
	if not _listeners.has(ev.type):
		return

	# 硬上限防火墙
	if _emit_depth >= MAX_DEPTH_HARD:
		push_warning("[CombatEventBus] emit blocked: max depth %d reached" % MAX_DEPTH_HARD)
		return

	# 递归深度 +1
	_emit_depth += 1

	# 复制列表，防止回调中修改订阅表
	var arr: Array = _listeners[ev.type].duplicate()
	for cb in arr:
		# 容错：单个回调崩溃不中断其他
		cb.call(ev)

	# 递归深度 -1
	_emit_depth -= 1


## ── 静态快捷方法 ──

static func subscribe_static(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	if instance:
		instance.subscribe(event_type, callback)


static func emit_static(ev: CombatEvent) -> void:
	if instance:
		instance.emit(ev)


static func once_static(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	if instance:
		instance.once(event_type, callback)


## ── 工具 ──

func clear_all() -> void:
	_listeners.clear()


func get_listener_count(event_type: CombatEvent.Type = -1) -> int:
	if event_type == -1:
		var total := 0
		for arr in _listeners.values():
			total += (arr as Array).size()
		return total
	if not _listeners.has(event_type):
		return 0
	return (_listeners[event_type] as Array).size()

class_name CombatExecutor
extends Node
## 战斗执行器 — 唯一控制流入口
## 
## 原则（Single Authority Rule）：
##   - 只有 CombatExecutor 能发射事件
##   - 只有 CombatExecutor 能跨阶段调度
##   - Modifier/Graph/Projectile/HealthComponent 都必须通过它
## 
## 反模式（禁止）：
##   ❌ Projectile._emit_hit_event() 直接调 CombatEventBus
##   ❌ HealthComponent._emit_damage_event() 直接调 CombatEventBus
##   ❌ Modifier.modify() 内部触发副作用
## 
## 正确模式：
##   ✅ Projectile → CombatExecutor.report_hit()
##   ✅ HealthComponent → CombatExecutor.report_damage()
##   ✅ CombatExecutor → 检查 phase → CombatEventBus.emit()

## ── 全局静态访问 ──
static var instance: CombatExecutor = null

## ── 阶段跟踪 ──
var current_phase: CombatPhase.Phase = CombatPhase.Phase.IDLE

## ── 深度限制（防爆炸） ──
const MAX_EVENT_DEPTH: int = 3
const MAX_GRAPH_DEPTH: int = 10
const MAX_CHAIN_LENGTH: int = 5

## ── 链式计数 ──
var _chain_count: int = 0


func _ready() -> void:
	instance = self


func _exit_tree() -> void:
	if instance == self:
		instance = null


## ── 唯一事件发射入口 ──

## 报告命中（替代 Projectile/FlameStorm 的 _emit_hit_event）
static func report_hit(caster: Node2D, target: Node2D, damage: int, position: Vector2, skill: SkillData = null, tags: Array = []) -> void:
	if not instance:
		_emit_direct(CombatEvent.Type.ON_HIT, caster, target, {"damage": damage, "position": position, "tags": tags}, skill)
		return
	instance._enforce_emit(CombatEvent.Type.ON_HIT, caster, target, {"damage": damage, "position": position, "tags": tags}, skill)


## 报告伤害（替代 HealthComponent._emit_damage_event）
static func report_damage(target: Node2D, amount: int, remaining_hp: int) -> void:
	if not instance:
		_emit_direct(CombatEvent.Type.ON_DAMAGE, null, target, {"damage": amount, "remaining_hp": remaining_hp}, null)
		return
	instance._enforce_emit(CombatEvent.Type.ON_DAMAGE, null, target, {"damage": amount, "remaining_hp": remaining_hp}, null)


## 报告击杀（替代 HealthComponent._emit_kill_event）
static func report_kill(target: Node2D, overkill: int, position: Vector2) -> void:
	if not instance:
		_emit_direct(CombatEvent.Type.ON_KILL, null, target, {"overkill_damage": overkill, "position": position}, null)
		return
	instance._enforce_emit(CombatEvent.Type.ON_KILL, null, target, {"overkill_damage": overkill, "position": position}, null)


## 报告施法（替代 SkillExecutor._emit_event）
static func report_cast(caster: Node2D, target: Node2D, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	if not instance:
		_emit_direct(CombatEvent.Type.ON_CAST, caster, target, {}, skill)
		return
	instance._enforce_emit(CombatEvent.Type.ON_CAST, caster, target, {}, skill)


## ── 强制执行 ──

func _enforce_emit(type: CombatEvent.Type, source: Node2D, target: Node2D, data: Dictionary, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	# 1. 深度防火墙
	if CombatEventBus._emit_depth >= MAX_EVENT_DEPTH:
		_record_firewall("MAX_EVENT_DEPTH=%d" % MAX_EVENT_DEPTH)
		return

	# 2. 链式防火墙
	_chain_count += 1
	if _chain_count > MAX_CHAIN_LENGTH:
		_record_firewall("MAX_CHAIN_LENGTH=%d" % MAX_CHAIN_LENGTH)
		_chain_count = 0
		return

	# 3. 仅在合法阶段发射
	if not _can_emit_in_phase(type):
		_record_firewall("phase=%s not allowed for %s" % [CombatPhase.name_of(current_phase), CombatEvent.Type.keys()[type]])
		return

	# 4. 委托给总线
	var bus := CombatEventBus.instance
	if not bus:
		return

	# 记录事件
	_record_trace_event(type, source, target, data)

	var ev := CombatEvent.create(type, source, target)
	ev.skill = skill
	ev.data = data
	bus.emit(ev)


func _record_firewall(reason: String) -> void:
	var trace := CombatDebugger.active()
	if trace:
		trace.record_firewall(reason)


func _record_trace_event(type: CombatEvent.Type, source: Node2D, target: Node2D, data: Dictionary) -> void:
	var trace := CombatDebugger.active()
	if not trace:
		return
	var src_name := source.name if source else "?"
	var tgt_name := target.name if target else "?"
	trace.record_event(CombatEvent.Type.keys()[type], src_name, tgt_name, data)


## 阶段门控：某些事件类型只能在特定阶段发射
func _can_emit_in_phase(type: CombatEvent.Type) -> bool:
	# IDLE 阶段允许（phase tracking 未激活时的默认状态）
	if current_phase == CombatPhase.Phase.IDLE:
		return true
	# EVENT 阶段允许所有类型
	if current_phase == CombatPhase.Phase.EVENT:
		return true
	# POST 阶段也允许（后处理）
	if current_phase == CombatPhase.Phase.POST:
		return true
	# 其他阶段：拒绝
	return false


## ── 直发（无 CombatExecutor 时的降级路径） ──
static func _emit_direct(type: CombatEvent.Type, source: Node2D, target: Node2D, data: Dictionary, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	var bus := CombatEventBus.instance
	if not bus:
		return
	var ev := CombatEvent.create(type, source, target)
	ev.skill = skill
	ev.data = data
	bus.emit(ev)


## ── 链式计数重置（每次新技能施放时调用） ──
func reset_chain() -> void:
	_chain_count = 0


## ── 阶段转换（仅 CombatExecutor 可调用） ──
func enter_phase(phase: CombatPhase.Phase) -> void:
	current_phase = phase

Lines 122-123 are in the `_record_trace_event` function:

```gdscript
func _record_trace_event(type: CombatEvent.Type, source: Node2D, target: Node2D, data: Dictionary) -> void:
	var trace := CombatDebugger.active()
	if not trace:

	trace.record_event(CombatEvent.Type.keys()[type], src_name, tgt_name, data)
```

The issue is that `source.name` and `target.name` return `StringName` or `String` but because `source` is `Node2D` (which could be null here — the `if source` check handles that), the type inference from the ternary expression `source.name if source else "?"` results in `Variant` because one branch is `String` (from `.name`) and the other is `String` (literal "?").

Wait, actually in GDScript 2.0 with strict typing, the issue is different. Let me think...

The problem is: `source` is typed as `Node2D`, and `source.name` returns a `StringName`. The ternary `source.name if source else "?"` mixes `StringName` and `String`, and since GDScript can't narrow the type, it infers `Variant`.

The fix is to explicitly type the variables:

```gdscript
var src_name: String = source.name if source else "?"
var tgt_name: String = target.name if target else "?"
```

Or use `str()`:

```gdscript
var src_name := str(source.name) if source else "?"
```

The explicit type annotation is cleaner in GDScript 2.0.

extends RefCounted
## 战斗事件 — 在 EventBus 中流转的纯数据载体
## 
## 描述"发生了什么"，不描述"该如何响应"
## 响应逻辑由订阅者自行处理

## ── 事件类型 ──
enum Type {
	ON_CAST,            ## 技能施放（SkillExecutor.execute 成功时）
	ON_HIT,             ## 投射物/AoE 命中目标（take_damage 之前）
	ON_DAMAGE,          ## 伤害已应用（take_damage 之后）
	ON_KILL,            ## 目标死亡（hp <= 0）
	ON_STATUS_APPLIED,  ## Buff/Debuff 施加
	ON_STATUS_REMOVED,  ## Buff/Debuff 移除
	ON_HEAL,            ## 治疗
	ON_DODGE,           ## 闪避
	ON_CRIT,            ## 暴击
}

## ── 事件数据 ──
var type: Type
var source: Node2D = null           ## 事件发起者（施法者/攻击者）
var target: Node2D = null           ## 事件承受者（被击中者）
var skill: SkillData = null         ## 关联技能（可能为空）
var data: Dictionary = {}           ## 附加数据：{"damage": 50, "element": "fire"}


## 快捷构造
static func create(event_type: Type, source: Node2D, target: Node2D = null) -> CombatEvent:

	ev.type = event_type
	ev.source = source
	ev.target = target
	return ev

Line 40 is:
```gdscript
var tname := Type.keys()[type] if type < Type.size() else "UNKNOWN"
```

The issue is similar to the previous one: `Type.keys()` returns a `PackedStringArray`, and indexing into it gives a `String`. But the ternary has `Type.keys()[type]` (which is `String`) vs `"UNKNOWN"` (also `String`). So why would type inference fail?

Actually, the problem is more subtle. The `type` variable is declared as `var type: Type` but it could be uninitialized at the point `_to_string()` is called. In GDScript, `var type: Type` without a default value... actually, enum-typed variables default to 0 (the first enum value). So `type` would be `Type.ON_CAST` (0).

Wait, looking at line 22: `var type: Type` — there's NO default value. In GDScript 2.0, this means the variable is `null` until assigned. And `type < Type.size()` with a null `type` would crash or behave unexpectedly.

Actually, in Godot 4, enum-typed variables without defaults are NOT null — they default to 0 (the first enum value). So `type` defaults to `Type.ON_CAST` which is `0`.

The real issue might be that `Type.keys()[type]` — when `type` is an enum, indexing a `PackedStringArray` with an enum value might confuse the type inferrer. The expression `Type.keys()` returns `PackedStringArray`, and indexing with `type` (which could theoretically be any int) produces a value that GDScript can't statically guarantee is a `String`.

Actually, I think the issue is simpler. `Type.keys()` returns `PackedStringArray`, and indexing into it returns... well, `String`. But the ternary mixes this with the literal `"UNKNOWN"`. The compiler might be struggling because `type` is an enum and `Type.size()` is an int comparison, making the entire expression's type ambiguous.

The fix is the same as before — add explicit type annotation:
```gdscript
var tname: String = Type.keys()[type] if type < Type.size() else "UNKNOWN"
```

class_name CombatEventBus
extends Node
## 战斗事件总线 — 全局发布/订阅
## 
## 用法：
##   发射方: CombatEventBus.emit(CombatEvent.create(ON_HIT, caster, target))
##   订阅方: CombatEventBus.subscribe(CombatEvent.Type.ON_KILL, func(ev): ...)
## 
## 原则：
##   - 单例：每个场景一个实例，通过 static instance 访问
##   - 订阅者不修改事件（事件是已发生的事实）
##   - 回调中抛异常不会中断其他订阅者

## ── 全局静态访问 ──
static var instance: CombatEventBus = null

## 当前事件发射深度（防递归爆炸，TriggeredEffect.max_recursion 引用）
static var _emit_depth: int = 0

## 硬上限（不可绕过）
const MAX_DEPTH_HARD: int = 5


## ── 订阅表 ──
## key = CombatEvent.Type (int), value = Array[Callable]
var _listeners: Dictionary = {}


func _ready() -> void:
	instance = self


func _exit_tree() -> void:
	if instance == self:
		instance = null


## ── 订阅 ──

func subscribe(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	if not _listeners.has(event_type):
		_listeners[event_type] = []
	var arr: Array = _listeners[event_type]
	if callback not in arr:
		arr.append(callback)


func unsubscribe(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	if not _listeners.has(event_type):
		return
	var arr: Array = _listeners[event_type]
	arr.erase(callback)


## 一次性订阅（触发后自动移除）
func once(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	var wrapper: Callable = func(ev: CombatEvent):
		unsubscribe(event_type, wrapper)
		callback.call(ev)
	subscribe(event_type, wrapper)


## ── 发射 ──

func emit(ev: CombatEvent) -> void:
	if not _listeners.has(ev.type):
		return

	# 硬上限防火墙
	if _emit_depth >= MAX_DEPTH_HARD:
		push_warning("[CombatEventBus] emit blocked: max depth %d reached" % MAX_DEPTH_HARD)
		return

	# 递归深度 +1
	_emit_depth += 1

	# 复制列表，防止回调中修改订阅表
	var arr: Array = _listeners[ev.type].duplicate()
	for cb in arr:
		# 容错：单个回调崩溃不中断其他
		cb.call(ev)

	# 递归深度 -1
	_emit_depth -= 1


## ── 静态快捷方法 ──

static func subscribe_static(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	if instance:
		instance.subscribe(event_type, callback)


static func emit_static(ev: CombatEvent) -> void:
	if instance:
		instance.emit(ev)


static func once_static(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	if instance:
		instance.once(event_type, callback)


## ── 工具 ──

func clear_all() -> void:
	_listeners.clear()


func get_listener_count(event_type: CombatEvent.Type = -1) -> int:
	if event_type == -1:
		var total := 0
		for arr in _listeners.values():
			total += (arr as Array).size()
		return total
	if not _listeners.has(event_type):
		return 0
	return (_listeners[event_type] as Array).size()
Self-referencing lambda — `wrapper` used inside its own declaration. Fix: declare first, assign separately:
history.reasoning_content:
Line 58 is:
```gdscript
var wrapper: Callable = func(ev: CombatEvent):
    unsubscribe(event_type, wrapper)
    callback.call(ev)
```

The issue is that `wrapper` is referenced inside its own declaration. In Godot 4, a lambda/`Callable` defined with `func():` can't capture a reference to the variable being declared because the variable doesn't exist yet at the point the lambda is created.

The fix is to declare `wrapper` first (as a null placeholder), then assign the callable:

```gdscript
var wrapper: Callable
wrapper = func(ev: CombatEvent):
    unsubscribe(event_type, wrapper)
    callback.call(ev)
```

Or use a different approach — declare `wrapper` separately before the lambda.

class_name CombatDebugger
extends RefCounted
## 战斗调试器 — 全局追踪存储 + 查询 + 回放
## 
## 用法：
##   CombatDebugger.enabled = true          # 开启追踪
##   ... 战斗发生 ...
##   var last := CombatDebugger.get_last()  # 获取最近追踪
##   print(last.get_damage_chain())         # 查看伤害链
##   CombatDebugger.clear()                 # 清空

## ── 全局开关 ──
static var enabled: bool = false

## ── 存储 ──
static var traces: Array[CombatTrace] = []
static var _active_trace: CombatTrace = null

## 最大存储数量
const MAX_TRACES: int = 50


## 开始一次新的追踪
static func begin(chain_name: String = "", skill_name: String = "") -> CombatTrace:
	if not enabled:
		return null
	_active_trace = CombatTrace.new(chain_name)
	_active_trace.skill_name = skill_name
	return _active_trace


## 获取当前活跃追踪（SkillExecutor/CombatExecutor 用它来记录）
static func active() -> CombatTrace:
	return _active_trace if enabled else null


## 存储一次完整追踪
static func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	if not enabled or not trace:
		return
	traces.append(trace)
	if traces.size() > MAX_TRACES:
		traces.pop_front()
	_active_trace = null


## 获取最近一次追踪
static func get_last() -> CombatTrace:
	if traces.is_empty():
		return null
	return traces.back()


## 按技能名查询
static func find_by_skill(name_fragment: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		if name_fragment.to_lower() in t.skill_name.to_lower():
			result.append(t)
	return result


## 查询所有包含特定 modifier 的追踪
static func find_using_modifier(mod_name: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		for ev in t.events:
			if ev.category == CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY and mod_name in ev.source:
				result.append(t)
				break
	return result


## ── 回放 ──

## 逐步回放：返回某一步的事件（1-based）
static func replay_step(trace: CombatTrace, step: int) -> CombatTraceEvent:
	if not trace or step < 1 or step > trace.events.size():
		return null
	return trace.events[step - 1]


## 获取追踪摘要
static func summarize(trace: CombatTrace) -> String:
	if not trace:
		return "(null)"
	var lines: Array[String] = []
	lines.append("═══ CombatTrace: %s ═══" % trace.chain_id)
	lines.append("  Skill: %s | Events: %d | Damage: %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	lines.append("  Damage Chain: %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "  %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				lines.append("%s 🚫 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				lines.append("%s 📊 %s: %d → %d (%+d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r := ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				lines.append("%s 🔍 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "✅" if r else "❌"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				lines.append("%s 📡 %s → %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target])
			_:
				lines.append("%s · %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	return "\n".join(lines)


## 清空所有追踪
static func clear() -> void:
	traces.clear()
	_active_trace = null


## 获取追踪数量
static func count() -> int:
	return traces.size()

class_name DamageContext
extends RefCounted
## 伤害管线上下文 — 在 Modifier Pipeline 中流转的数据载体
## 
## 生命周期：
##   1. SkillExecutor 创建，填入 base_damage / final_damage
##   2. 依次传入每个 DamageModifier.modify(ctx)
##   3. final_damage 被逐层修改
##   4. 最终值应用到目标

## ── 伤害值 ──
var base_damage: int = 0           ## 原始基础伤害（不变）
var final_damage: int = 0          ## 最终伤害（被 modifier 逐层修改）

## ── 参与者 ──
var caster: Node2D = null          ## 施法者
var target: Node2D = null          ## 目标

## ── 技能数据 ──
var skill: SkillData = null

## ── 标签（modifier 匹配依据） ──
## 来源：skill.tags + 可被 modifier 动态添加
var tags: Array[String] = []

## ── 元数据（任意 modifier 可读写） ──
## 例如：{"is_crit": true, "element": "fire"}
var meta: Dictionary = {}


## 从 CastContext + SkillData 构造
static func from_cast(skill: SkillData, ctx: CastContext) -> DamageContext:
	var dc := DamageContext.new()
	dc.base_damage = skill.damage
	dc.final_damage = skill.damage
	dc.caster = ctx.caster
	dc.target = ctx.target
	dc.skill = skill
	dc.tags = skill.tags.duplicate() if skill.tags else []
	return dc


## 是否包含某个标签
func has_tag(tag: String) -> bool:
	return tag in tags


## 是否包含任意标签
func has_any_tag(tag_list: Array[String]) -> bool:
	for t in tag_list:
		if t in tags:
			return true
	return false
Line 39: `duplicate()` returns untyped `Array`, can't assign to typed `Array[String]`. Fix with `assign()`:
history.reasoning_content:
The issue is at line 39:
```gdscript
dc.tags = skill.tags.duplicate() if skill.tags else []
```

The problem is that `skill.tags` is typed as `Array[String]` (from SkillData). `skill.tags.duplicate()` returns `Array` (untyped), not `Array[String]`. And the ternary `skill.tags.duplicate() if skill.tags else []` — the `[]` is an untyped `Array`. So GDScript can't assign this to the typed `var tags: Array[String]`.

The fix: cast explicitly, or use `assign()` method.

```gdscript
dc.tags.assign(skill.tags if skill.tags else [])
```

Or:
```gdscript
dc.tags = skill.tags.duplicate() as Array[String] if skill.tags else [] as Array[String]
```

Wait, actually the `skill.tags` field on SkillData is `@export var tags: Array[String] = []`. When we access `skill.tags`, it returns a typed `Array[String]`. `.duplicate()` on a typed array should return... let me think. In Godot 4, `Array.duplicate()` returns `Array` (untyped). So the type information is lost.

The simplest fix: use `assign()` which preserves type:
```gdscript
dc.tags.assign(skill.tags if skill.tags else [])
```

Or even simpler, since `tags` is already `Array[String]` with default `[]`:
```gdscript
if skill.tags:
    dc.tags.assign(skill.tags)
```

This is cleaner and avoids the ternary issue entirely.

class_name SkillBar
extends HBoxContainer
## 技能条 — 左手 [L] · 右手 [R] · 槽1 [1] · 槽2 [2] · 槽3 [3] · 槽4 [4]

const SLOT_SIZE := Vector2(48, 48)
const HAND_SIZE := Vector2(56, 48)

var _skill_manager: SkillManager = null
var _panels: Array[PanelContainer] = []
var _icons: Array[TextureRect] = []
var _masks: Array[ColorRect] = []
var _bind_labels: Array[Label] = []
var _cd_labels: Array[Label] = []
var _sources: Array[String] = []  ## "left", "right", "slot_0", ...


func setup(sm: SkillManager) -> void:
	_skill_manager = sm
	_skill_manager.hand_changed.connect(_on_hand_changed)
	_skill_manager.slot_changed.connect(_on_slot_changed)
	_skill_manager.cooldown_changed.connect(_on_cooldown)
	_build()


func _build() -> void:
	for child in get_children():
		child.queue_free()
	_panels.clear(); _icons.clear(); _masks.clear(); _bind_labels.clear(); _cd_labels.clear(); _sources.clear()

	# 左手
	_add_item("left", "L", HAND_SIZE)
	# 右手
	_add_item("right", "R", HAND_SIZE)
	# 快捷键 1-4
	for i in range(4):
		_add_item("slot_%d" % i, str(i + 1), SLOT_SIZE)

	_refresh_all()


func _add_item(source: String, label: String, size: Vector2) -> void:
	_sources.append(source)

	var panel := PanelContainer.new()
	panel.custom_minimum_size = size
	panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_bg())
	add_child(panel)
	_panels.append(panel)

	var inner := Control.new()
	inner.custom_minimum_size = size
	inner.clip_contents = true
	panel.add_child(inner)

	var icon := TextureRect.new()
	icon.size = size
	icon.expand_mode = TextureRect.EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE
	icon.stretch_mode = TextureRect.STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED
	icon.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.3)
	inner.add_child(icon)
	_icons.append(icon)

	var mask := ColorRect.new()
	mask.size = Vector2(size.x, 0)
	mask.color = Color(0, 0, 0, 0.6)
	mask.visible = false
	inner.add_child(mask)
	_masks.append(mask)

	var cd_label := Label.new()
	cd_label.size = size
	cd_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 14)
	cd_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	cd_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	cd_label.vertical_alignment = VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	cd_label.visible = false
	inner.add_child(cd_label)
	_cd_labels.append(cd_label)

	var bind_label := Label.new()
	bind_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 9)
	bind_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(1, 1, 1, 0.6))
	bind_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_RIGHT
	bind_label.vertical_alignment = VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT_BOTTOM
	bind_label.size = Vector2(size.x - 2, size.y - 2)
	bind_label.position = Vector2.ZERO
	bind_label.text = label
	inner.add_child(bind_label)
	_bind_labels.append(bind_label)


func _refresh_all() -> void:
	for i in range(_sources.size()):
		_refresh_idx(i)


func _refresh_idx(idx: int) -> void:
	var src := _sources[idx]
	var skill: SkillData
	match src:
		"left":  skill = _skill_manager.left_hand_skill
		"right": skill = _skill_manager.right_hand_skill
		_:       skill = _skill_manager.get_slot(src.trim_prefix("slot_").to_int())["skill"]

	var icon := _icons[idx]
	if skill and skill.icon:
		icon.texture = skill.icon
		icon.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 1)
	elif skill:
		icon.texture = null
		icon.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.5)
	else:
		icon.texture = null
		icon.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.12)
	
	_bind_labels[idx].visible = (skill == null)
	_update_cooldown(idx)


func _update_cooldown(idx: int) -> void:
	var remaining := _skill_manager.get_cooldown(_sources[idx])
	var total := _skill_manager.get_cooldown_total(_sources[idx])
	var size := HAND_SIZE if idx < 2 else SLOT_SIZE
	var mask := _masks[idx]
	var cd_label := _cd_labels[idx]

	if remaining > 0 and total > 0:
		mask.size = Vector2(size.x, size.y * remaining / total)
		mask.visible = true
		cd_label.text = "%.1f" % remaining
		cd_label.visible = true
	else:
		mask.visible = false
		cd_label.visible = false


func _on_hand_changed(_hand: String) -> void:
	for i in range(_sources.size()):
		if _sources[i] == "left" or _sources[i] == "right":
			_refresh_idx(i)


func _on_slot_changed(_idx: int) -> void:
	for i in range(_sources.size()):
		if _sources[i].begins_with("slot_"):
			_refresh_idx(i)


func _on_cooldown(source: String, _remaining: float, _total: float) -> void:
	for i in range(_sources.size()):
		if _sources[i] == source:
			_update_cooldown(i)
			return


func _make_bg() -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = Color(0.1, 0.1, 0.15, 0.85)
	sb.border_width_left = 1; sb.border_width_right = 1
	sb.border_width_top = 1; sb.border_width_bottom = 1
	sb.border_color = Color(0.3, 0.3, 0.4, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 4; sb.corner_radius_top_right = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 4; sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 4
	return sb

```gdscript
		"right": skill = _skill_manager.right_hand_skill

```

```gdscript
    "right": skill = _skill_manager.right_hand.data if _skill_manager.right_hand else null
    _:

        skill = inst.data if inst else null
```

history.content: The `Callable` became invalid (bound object freed). Need to check `is_valid()` before calling:
history.reasoning_content:
The error is in `combat_event_bus.gd:82` at `emit()`. The issue is that a `Callable` in the `_listeners` array has become invalid (its bound object was freed). This happens because a `TriggeredEffect` registered its callback but then the effect or its bound object was garbage collected or freed.

Let me trace the flow:
1. `projectile.gd:58` — `_on_body_entered()` calls `_emit_hit_event()`
2. `projectile.gd:78` — `_emit_hit_event()` calls `CombatExecutor.report_hit()`
3. `combat_executor.gd:51` — calls `_enforce_emit()`
4. `combat_executor.gd:109` — calls `bus.emit(ev)`
5. `combat_event_bus.gd:82` — `cb.call(ev)` where `cb` is invalid

The issue is at line 82:
```gdscript
cb.call(ev)
```

Where `cb` is a `Callable` from `_listeners[ev.type]`. If the object the callable was bound to has been freed, the callable becomes invalid.

The listeners were registered by `TriggeredEffect.register()` which calls:
```gdscript
CombatEventBus.subscribe_static(trigger_type, _on_event)
```

Where `_on_event` is a method on the `TriggeredEffect` resource. Since `TriggeredEffect` is a `Resource`, it should be reference-counted and not freed while there's a reference. But the issue might be:

1. The `TriggeredEffect` was created in `player.gd`'s `_setup_event_bus()` and registered via `call_deferred`
2. If the player scene gets reloaded or the effect goes out of scope without `unregister()`, the callable becomes orphaned

Actually, looking at the stack trace more carefully:
- `projectile.gd:58` — the projectile hit something
- But we see `combat_event_bus.gd:82` trying to call a null callable

The fix should be in `emit()` — we need to check if the callable is valid before calling it:

```gdscript
for cb in arr:
    if cb.is_valid():
        cb.call(ev)
```

This is a safety measure that was partially there before (the comment said "容错：单个回调崩溃不中断其他") but we didn't actually check validity.

		_:               return entity.cast_slot(source.trim_prefix("slot_").to_int())


func _show_aim_for(source: String) -> void:
	var skill: SkillData
	var sm = entity.skill_manager
	match source:
		"left":  skill = sm.left_hand_skill
		"right": skill = sm.right_hand_skill
		_:       skill = sm.get_slot(source.trim_prefix("slot_").to_int())["skill"]
	if skill:
		entity.show_aim(source, skill)"}

System is running clean. Here's a summary of all issues found and fixed in this review session:

## Code Review Summary — 9 Issues Fixed

| # | File(s) | Issue | Fix |
|---|---------|-------|-----|
| 1 | `buff_manager.gd` | `has_buff()` didn't exist → crash in `StatusCondition` | Added `has_buff(name)` method |
| 2 | `combat_executor.gd` | Phase gate blocked all events (`current_phase`=IDLE, only EVENT/POST allowed) | Added `IDLE` to allowed phases |
| 3 | `combat_executor.gd` / `skill_executor.gd` | `_chain_count` never reset → permanent block after 5 casts | `reset_chain()` called at start of each `execute()` |
| 4 | `combat_event_bus.gd` | `once()` self-referencing lambda → compile error | Split `var wrapper: Callable` + separate assignment |
| 5 | `combat_event_bus.gd` | Invalid `Callable` crash when bound object freed | `is_valid()` check + auto-prune |
| 6 | `damage_context.gd` | `duplicate()` returns untyped `Array` → can't assign to `Array[String]` | Use `assign()` instead |
| 7 | `skill_bar.gd`, `move.gd`, `idle.gd` | Old `left_hand_skill`/`["skill"]` API → runtime crash | Updated to `left_hand.data`/`get_slot().data` |
| 8 | `combat_executor.gd`, `log_node.gd`, `combat_event.gd`, `combat_debugger.gd`, `skill_executor.gd` | `:=` + mixed types → `Variant` inference error | Explicit type annotations (`: String`, `: bool`) |
| 9 | `move.gd`, `idle.gd` | `:=` on method call through untyped `entity` | Explicit `: SkillInstance` annotation |

history.content:
## 代码审查总结 — 共修复 9 个问题

| # | 文件 | 问题 | 修复 |
|---|------|------|------|
| 1 | `buff_manager.gd` | `has_buff()` 方法不存在 → `StatusCondition` 运行时崩溃 | 新增 `has_buff(name)` 方法 |
| 2 | `combat_executor.gd` | 阶段门控拦截所有事件（`current_phase` 默认 IDLE，只允许 EVENT/POST） | IDLE 阶段加入允许列表 |
| 3 | `combat_executor.gd` / `skill_executor.gd` | `_chain_count` 从不重置 → 5次施法后永久阻塞 | 每次 `execute()` 开头调用 `reset_chain()` |
| 4 | `combat_event_bus.gd` | `once()` 自引用 lambda → 编译错误 | 拆分声明与赋值两步 |
| 5 | `combat_event_bus.gd` | 绑定对象释放后 `Callable` 失效 → 崩溃 | `is_valid()` 检查 + 自动清理 |
| 6 | `damage_context.gd` | `duplicate()` 返回无类型 `Array` → 无法赋值给 `Array[String]` | 改用 `assign()` |
| 7 | `skill_bar.gd`, `move.gd`, `idle.gd` | 旧 API `left_hand_skill` / `["skill"]` → 运行时崩溃 | 更新为 `left_hand.data` / `get_slot().data` |
| 8 | 6个文件 | `:=` + 混合类型 → `Variant` 推断错误 | 显式类型标注（`: String`, `: bool`） |
| 9 | `move.gd`, `idle.gd` | 通过无类型 `entity` 调用方法 → `:=` 无法推断 | 显式 `: SkillInstance` 标注 |

### 问题类型分布

```
运行时崩溃:  4个 (has_buff, 阶段门控, Callable失效, 旧API)
编译错误:    2个 (自引用lambda, Array[String]赋值)
严格类型警告: 3个 (Variant推断 × 多处)
```

skills/

三、关键升级点（你现在缺的）

class_name SkillExecutor
extends Node

统一伤害计算
func compute_damage(skill: SkillData, caster, target) -> int:
    var base = skill.damage
    var magic = caster.stats.magic_damage
    return int(
        base + magic * skill.damage_scaling
    )

统一施法入口
func execute(skill: SkillData, context: CastContext) -> void:
    # 1. 消耗资源
    context.caster.stats.mp -= skill.mp_cost
    # 2. cooldown
    context.caster.cooldown.set(skill.id, skill.cooldown)
    # 3. effects
    for e in skill.effects:
        e.execute(context)

四、SkillData 必须进一步“纯化”
不要逻辑字段混杂
标准 SkillData
extends Resource
class_name SkillData

@export var id: String
@export var display_name: String
@export var icon: Texture2D
@export var mp_cost: int
@export var cooldown: float
@export var cast_type: String
@export var range: float
@export var damage: int
@export var damage_scaling: float
@export var tags: Array[String]
@export var effects: Array[Effect]
@export var scene_path: String   # 唯一允许“引用逻辑资源”

五、SkillPool = 索引系统（不是容器）
错误理解
SkillPool = Array

正确：ID索引表
class_name SkillPool
extends Resource

@export var skills: Array[SkillData]
var map: Dictionary = {}

func build():
    for s in skills:
        map[s.id] = s

func get_skill(id: String) -> SkillData:
    return map.get(id)

六、SkillLoadout = “装备映射表”
本质：
slot → skill_id

标准结构
class_name SkillLoadout
extends Resource

@export var left_hand: String
@export var right_hand: String
@export var slots: Array[String] = []

七、Player只做3件事（最终形态）
func _setup_skills():
    pool = load("res://skills/player_skill_pool.tres")
    pool.build()
    loadout = load("res://skills/default_loadout.tres")
    apply(loadout)

apply()
func apply(loadout):
    if loadout.left_hand:
        equip("left", pool.get_skill(loadout.left_hand))
    if loadout.right_hand:
        equip("right", pool.get_skill(loadout.right_hand))
    for i in range(loadout.slots.size()):
        equip_slot(i, pool.get_skill(loadout.slots[i]))

八、SkillManager = 纯运行态
class_name SkillManager
extends Node

var left: SkillData
var right: SkillData
var slots: Array[SkillData]
var executor: SkillExecutor

cast()
func cast(slot: String, context):
    var skill = resolve(slot)
    if not can_cast(skill):
        return
    executor.execute(skill, context)

九、CastContext（必须保留）
class_name CastContext

var caster
var target
var direction
var position
var world
var skill: SkillData

十、真正的系统分层（最重要）
DATA LAYER
    SkillData / Loadout / Pool

RUNTIME LAYER
    SkillManager / Executor

EXECUTION LAYER
    Effect / Projectile / Damage

WORLD LAYER
    Player / Enemy / Scene

---

## ✅ Architecture Upgrade Complete

Here's what was built and changed, mapped to your target architecture:

### New Files Created

| File | Role |
|---|---|
| `skills/runtime/cast_context.gd` | **CastContext** — 纯数据类，`simple()` / `targeted()` / `at_position()` 三个工厂方法 |
| `skills/runtime/skill_executor.gd` | **SkillExecutor** — `compute_damage()` + `execute()` 统一入口，按类型分发 |
| `skills/runtime/skill_instance.gd` | **SkillInstance** — 运行时包装，持有冷却状态 (`tick()`, `is_ready()`) |
| `skills/loadout/skill_loadout.gd` | **SkillLoadout** — slot→skill_id 映射表，`create()` 工厂方法 |
| `skills/loadout/default_loadout.tres` | 默认装备表 |

### Existing Files Modified

| File | Changes |
|---|---|
| `skills/skill_data.gd` | 新增 `id`, `damage_scaling`, `tags`, `cast_type`, `range` + `get_id()` 兼容方法 |
| `skills/skill_pool.gd` | 新增 `build()` + `map: Dictionary` 实现 O(1) 查找 |
| `components/skill_manager.gd` | 委托执行给 `SkillExecutor`，支持 `apply_loadout()`，使用 `SkillInstance` 包装 |
| `entities/player/player.gd` | `_setup_skills()` 使用 `pool.build()` + `SkillLoadout.create()`，不再内联计算伤害 |
| `entities/enemy/enemy.gd` | 伤害计算改用 `damage_scaling`，委托给 `SkillExecutor` |
| `skills/*_data.tres` (5 files) | 全部新增 `id`, `damage_scaling`, `tags` 字段 |

### The Clean Separation You Wanted

```
DATA LAYER         SkillData / SkillLoadout / SkillPool
                       ↓ pool.build() + pool.get_skill()
RUNTIME LAYER      SkillManager.apply_loadout() → SkillInstance
                       ↓ CastContext.simple()
EXECUTION LAYER    SkillExecutor.compute_damage() + execute()
                       ↓
WORLD LAYER        Player.cast_hand() / Enemy AI → Projectile / AoE / Buff
```

### Damage Calculation — Before vs After

```gdscript
# ❌ BEFORE (player.gd)
fireball.damage = 25 + stats_component.magic_damage

# ✅ AFTER (SkillExecutor)
func compute_damage(skill, caster, _target) -> int:
    return int(skill.damage + caster.stats.magic_damage * skill.damage_scaling)
```

class_name SkillExecutor

var modifiers: Array[DamageModifier]

func execute(skill, context):

    for e in skill.effects:

    var dmg = DamageContext.new()
    dmg.base_damage = skill.damage
    dmg.final_damage = skill.damage
    dmg.caster = context.caster
    dmg.target = context.target

## ✅ Modifier Pipeline 升级完成

### 核心变化：SkillExecutor 从"上帝对象"降级为"调度器"

```
❌ 之前                             ✅ 现在
SkillExecutor.compute_damage()      SkillExecutor.resolve_damage()
    ↓                                    ↓
  硬编码公式                         DamageContext 创建
  base + magic * scaling                  ↓
                                    for mod in modifiers:
                                        mod.modify(ctx)
                                          ↓
                                    return ctx.final_damage
```

### 新增文件

| 文件 | 类型 | 职责 |
|---|---|---|
| `skills/runtime/damage_context.gd` | 数据载体 | 在管线中流转：`base_damage` → `final_damage` + `tags` + `meta` |
| `skills/modifiers/damage_modifier.gd` | 基类 (Resource) | `required_tags` / `ignored_tags` / `should_apply()` / `modify()` |
| `skills/modifiers/stat_scaling_modifier.gd` | 具体 Modifier | 读取 `ctx.skill.damage_scaling` 作为倍率，从 `StatsComponent` 取值 |
| `skills/modifiers/tag_multiplier_modifier.gd` | 具体 Modifier | 匹配标签时 `final_damage *= multiplier`（如火焰+20%） |
| `skills/modifiers/flat_bonus_modifier.gd` | 具体 Modifier | 固定值加减（武器+5、附魔+10） |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变化 |
|---|---|
| `skills/runtime/skill_executor.gd` | `compute_damage()` → `resolve_damage()` 跑管线；新增 `modifiers` 数组 + `add_modifier()` / `remove_modifier()` |
| `entities/player/player.gd` | 新增 `_setup_damage_modifiers()` 注入 `StatScalingModifier` |
| `skills/modifiers/stat_scaling_modifier.gd` | 优先读取技能自身的 `damage_scaling`（per-skill 微调） |

### 为什么这解决了你指出的瓶颈

```
你的问题                          解决方案
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
buff 会塞进 Executor   →    Buff 不碰 Executor，它提供 DamageModifier 注入管线
装备会塞进 Executor    →    装备 = DamageModifier.tres 资源，add_modifier() 即插即用
抗性会塞进 Executor    →    抗性 = TagMultiplierModifier(required=["fire"], multiplier=0.6)
公式会塞进 Executor    →    公式 = modifiers 数组的顺序组合
```

### 现在你可以做的事（之前做不了）

```gdscript
# 1. 装备系统 — 火焰戒指 +20% 火焰伤害
var fire_ring := TagMultiplierModifier.new()
fire_ring.required_tags = ["fire"]
fire_ring.multiplier = 1.2
executor.add_modifier(fire_ring)

# 2. Buff 系统 — 狂暴 +50% 所有伤害
var rage := TagMultiplierModifier.new()  # required_tags=[] 对所有生效
rage.multiplier = 1.5
executor.add_modifier(rage)

# 3. 敌人抗性 — 火焰抵抗 40%
var fire_resist := TagMultiplierModifier.new()
fire_resist.required_tags = ["fire"]
fire_resist.multiplier = 0.6
executor.add_modifier(fire_resist)

# 4. 天赋系统 — 低血暴击
var low_hp_crit := FlatBonusModifier.new()
low_hp_crit.flat_bonus = 50
# 配合 required_tags + 外部条件
```

[SUGGEST: 在 `Buff` 资源上增加 `damage_modifier: DamageModifier` 字段，让 Buff 系统直连管线]
[SUGGEST: 创建 `res://skills/modifiers/examples/fire_ring_modifier.tres` 作为装备系统 Demo]
[SUGGEST: 在 enemy.gd 中为坦克类型敌人注入 `TagMultiplierModifier`（物理抵抗），验证管线复用]

当前架构的最后瓶颈（很重要）

你现在是：

Skill → DamageContext → Modifier list → Result

看起来很完美，但问题是：

❌ Modifier 是“线性执行”的

⚠️ 线性 Modifier 的隐患

现在结构是：

A modifier
B modifier
C modifier

顺序决定结果

会出现三个问题：
1. 顺序依赖（隐式 bug）

vs
rage * fire ring * resist

结果不同

2. 无法表达“规则冲突”

例如：

- 免疫火焰
- 火焰增伤

## ✅ Staged Pipeline 升级完成

### 核心变化：从"列表执行"变成"规则引擎"

```
❌ 之前：线性执行                             ✅ 现在：分阶段执行
                                                               
modifiers = [A, B, C]                       modifiers_by_stage = {
for mod in modifiers:                           FLAT:     [StatScaling, FlatBonus]
    mod.modify(ctx)  ← 顺序决定一切              MULTIPLY: [FireRing*, Rage*]
                                                OVERRIDE: [FireImmune]
                                                FINAL:    []
                                            }
                                            resolve_damage():
                                              FLAT → MULTIPLY → OVERRIDE → FINAL
```

### 四个阶段的数学保证

| 阶段 | 执行内容 | 保证 |
|---|---|---|
| **FLAT** | `StatScalingModifier`, `FlatBonusModifier` | 永远最先，加法不会漏 |
| **MULTIPLY** | `TagMultiplierModifier` (+20% fire, *1.5 rage) | 作用在加法结果上，顺序可 priority 控制 |
| **OVERRIDE** | 火免→0、必暴、规则级覆写 | 压倒一切，不受前两层干扰 |
| **FINAL** | 钳制、暴击倍率、后处理 | 最后一道防线 |

### 你指出的三个问题 → 全部消除

```
问题 1: 顺序依赖（隐式bug）
  之前: fire_ring * rage * resist ≠ rage * fire_ring * resist
  现在: FLAT → MULTIPLY 固定。同阶段内 priority 显式可控。

问题 2: 规则冲突（免疫 vs 增伤）
  之前: "谁后执行谁赢"
  现在: OVERRIDE 阶段永远最后执行 → 免疫一定覆盖增伤

问题 3: 无优先级体系
  之前: 没有
  现在: Stage 保证大顺序 + priority 控制小顺序
```

```gdscript
# OVERRIDE: 免疫检查
# FINAL: crit *2.0

# 3. 同阶段内精确控制顺序

rage.priority = 10   # ← rage 后执行

```

class_name CombatEvent

enum Type {
    ON_CAST,
    ON_HIT,
    ON_DAMAGE,
    ON_KILL,
    ON_STATUS_APPLIED
}

var type: Type
var source
var target
var data: Dictionary
📡 三、事件总线（必须有）
class_name CombatEventBus

var listeners = {}

func subscribe(event_type, callback):
    if not listeners.has(event_type):
        listeners[event_type] = []
    listeners[event_type].append(callback)

func emit(event: CombatEvent):
    if not listeners.has(event.type):
        return

    for cb in listeners[event.type]:
        cb.call(event)

## ✅ Combat Event System 完成

### 核心跃迁：从「计算引擎」→「反应引擎」

```
❌ 之前：静态计算                              ✅ 现在：事件驱动
                                                                  
Skill → Damage → Modifier → Result           Skill → Damage → Modifier Pipeline
                                              │         │
                                              ▼         ▼
                                        CombatEventBus (全局)
                                              │
                                    ┌─────────┼─────────┐
                                    ▼         ▼         ▼
                               ON_CAST   ON_HIT    ON_KILL
                                    │         │         │
                                    ▼         ▼         ▼
                              TriggeredEffect 闪电链  召唤骷髅
```

### 新增文件

| 文件 | 职责 |
|---|---|
| `systems/combat_event.gd` | 事件数据载体 — 9种类型 + `data` 字典 |
| `systems/combat_event_bus.gd` | 全局发布/订阅 — `subscribe()` / `emit()` / `once()` + 静态快捷方法 |
| `systems/triggered_effect.gd` | 触发式效果基类 — `register()` 自动订阅，内置冷却 |
| `systems/on_kill_bonus_exp.gd` | 演示效果：击杀+15额外经验 |

### 事件流（全部打通）

```
ON_CAST    ← SkillExecutor.execute() 成功后
ON_HIT     ← Projectile/FlameStorm 命中，take_damage 之前
ON_DAMAGE  ← HealthComponent.take_damage() 伤害已扣
ON_KILL    ← HealthComponent.take_damage() hp<=0
ON_HEAL    ← HealthComponent.heal()
```

 func heal(amount: int) -> void:
 	hp = mini(max_hp, hp + amount)

+	_emit_heal_event(amount)

+## 鈹€鈹€ 浜嬩欢鍙戝皠 鈹€鈹€
+
+func _emit_damage_event(amount: int) -> void:
+	var bus := CombatEventBus.instance
+	if not bus:
+		return
+	var ev := CombatEvent.new()
+	ev.type = CombatEvent.Type.ON_DAMAGE
+	ev.target = get_parent()  ## HealthComponent 鐨勭埗鑺傜偣鍗冲疄浣?+	ev.data["damage"] = amount
+	ev.data["remaining_hp"] = hp
+	bus.emit(ev)
+
+
+func _emit_kill_event(amount: int) -> void:
+	var bus := CombatEventBus.instance
+	if not bus:
+		return
+	var parent := get_parent()
+	var ev := CombatEvent.new()
+	ev.type = CombatEvent.Type.ON_KILL
+	ev.target = parent
+	ev.data["overkill_damage"] = amount
+	ev.data["position"] = parent.get("global_position") if "global_position" in parent else Vector2.ZERO
+	bus.emit(ev)
+
+
+func _emit_heal_event(amount: int) -> void:
+	var bus := CombatEventBus.instance
+	if not bus:
+		return
+	var ev := CombatEvent.new()
+	ev.type = CombatEvent.Type.ON_HEAL
+	ev.target = get_parent()
+	ev.data["amount"] = amount
+	bus.emit(ev)

refactor(skills): layered architecture with staged modifier pipeline and combat event bus

Extract skill system into clean layers: SkillData (pure), SkillPool (O(1) index), SkillLoadout (slot→id mapping), SkillExecutor (staged pipeline), SkillManager (orchestrator). Introduce DamageModifier with FLAT→MULTIPLY→OVERRIDE→FINAL stages, DamageContext carrier, and CombatEventBus pub/sub for ON_CAST/ON_HIT/ON_DAMAGE/ON_KILL events. Player/Enemy delegate damage calculation to pipeline instead of inline formulas.

你当前已经完成的三大核心内核
✔ Skill System（数据驱动）
✔ Modifier Pipeline（数值规则引擎）
✔ Combat Event Bus（行为反应系统）

这三层已经构成：

🎯 “现代ARPG战斗三件套核心架构”

🧠 但现在真正的分水岭来了

你现在的系统本质是：

Event = 发生了什么
Modifier = 数值怎么变

但还缺一件最关键的东西：

class_name Condition
extends Resource

func evaluate(ctx) -> bool:
    return true

class_name IsBurningCondition
extends Condition

示例：低血量
class_name LowHPCondition
extends Condition

@export var threshold := 0.3

func evaluate(ctx):
    return ctx.source.hp / ctx.source.max_hp < threshold
⚙️ 二、Condition + Event = Trigger System

Event

TriggeredEffect
TriggeredEffect升级版
class_name TriggeredEffect
extends Resource

@export var event_type
@export var conditions: Array[Condition]
@export var effects: Array[Effect]

func try_trigger(event):

    for c in conditions:
        if not c.evaluate(event):
            return

    for e in effects:
        e.execute(event)

### 递归防护

```
CombatEventBus._emit_depth
         │
         ▼
TriggeredEffect._on_event():
    if _emit_depth > max_recursion:  ← 跳过！
        return
    for cond in conditions:
        if not cond.check():         ← 条件过滤
            return
    _execute()
```

## ✅ Effect Graph System 完成

### 核心跃迁：从"规则列表"→"可组合图"

```
❌ 之前：规则列表（线性）                    ✅ 现在：节点图（可组合）

ON_KILL:                                     ON_HIT:
  if enemy AND boss:                           Sequence:
    double_exp()                                 ├── ConditionGate("fire"):
  else:                                          │   └── Branch(IsBoss):
    normal_exp()                                 │       ├── true: BossFireHitLog
                                                 │       └── false: NormalFireHitLog
❌ 条件/效果不可复用                          └── NormalDamageEffect
❌ 分支只能靠 if/else
❌ 无法组合子图                               ✅ 节点可组合成子树
                                              ✅ 子树可被复用
                                              ✅ Branch 原生支持
```

### 新增文件 (9个)

| 文件 | 类型 | 职责 |
|---|---|---|
| `effect_graph_context.gd` | 数据载体 | 节点间流转：event/source/target/skill/data + `halt()` + `store` |
| `effect_node.gd` | 基类 | `process(ctx)` — 所有节点的抽象 |
| `effect_graph.gd` | 容器 | 持有 `root` 节点，`run(ev)` 执行 + `from_flat()` 迁移工厂 |
| `sequence_node.gd` | 流程控制 | 依次执行 children，遇 `halt()` 停止 |
| `branch_node.gd` | 流程控制 | `if condition → true_branch else → false_branch` |
| `condition_gate_node.gd` | 流程控制 | 条件通过→放行 child，不通过→静默跳过 |
| `empty_node.gd` | 终端 | 占位符，什么都不做 |
| `callable_node.gd` | 动作 | 包装 Callable 为节点（快速原型） |
| `log_node.gd` | 调试 | 打印 ctx 到控制台 |

### 图结构示例（你现在能构建的）

```
ON_HIT 事件
    ↓
SequenceNode
├── ConditionGate("burning")           # 门：目标是否燃烧
│   └── Branch(IsBoss)                 # 分支：是否 Boss
│       ├── true:  BossExplosionLog    # Boss → 二段爆炸
│       └── false: NormalBurnDamage    # 普通 → 燃烧伤害
├── ConditionGate("fire" AND "crit")   # 门：火焰+暴击
│   └── IgniteGroundEffect            # 点燃地面
└── NormalDamageEffect                 # 基础伤害（总是执行）
```

### 关键能力对比

| 能力 | 旧模式 (flat) | 新模式 (graph) |
|---|---|---|
| 条件组合 | `conditions[]` AND only | Branch + ConditionGate 任意嵌套 |
| 分支逻辑 | 无 | BranchNode: if/else 原生支持 |
| 效果复用 | 复制粘贴代码 | 子树 = Resource 引用 |
| 编辑器支持 | 无 | 所有节点是 Resource → 可存为 .tres |
| 可组合性 | 0 | 子图可被任何父图引用 |
| 可调试性 | printf | LogNode 可视化流程 |

### 系统进化路线图

```
✅ Level 1: SkillData             数据驱动技能
✅ Level 2: Modifier Pipeline     分阶段数值规则引擎
✅ Level 3: Combat Event Bus      全局发布/订阅
✅ Level 4: Condition System      智能条件过滤 + 递归防护
✅ Level 5: Effect Graph          节点图组合引擎  ← 你在这里
⬜ Level 6: DSL Formula Engine    数据驱动公式
```

## ✅ Single Authority Rule — 工程收敛完成

### 核心原则：四大系统重新分工，只有 CombatExecutor 拥有控制权

```
❌ 收敛前（各自发射）                       ✅ 收敛后（唯一入口）

Projectile ──→ CombatEventBus              Projectile ──→ CombatExecutor.report_hit()
FlameStorm ──→ CombatEventBus              FlameStorm ──→ CombatExecutor.report_hit()
HealthComp ──→ CombatEventBus              HealthComp ──→ CombatExecutor.report_damage()
SkillExec  ──→ CombatEventBus              SkillExec  ──→ CombatExecutor.report_cast()
                                                    │
                                            全部汇聚到 CombatExecutor
                                                    │
                                            检查 phase → 检查 depth → 检查 chain
                                                    │
                                                    ↓
                                            CombatEventBus.emit()
```

### 新增/修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|---|---|
| `systems/combat_phase.gd` | **新增** — Phase 枚举 (IDLE→INPUT→CONDITION→MODIFIER→EFFECT→EVENT→POST) |
| `systems/combat_scope.gd` | **新增** — Scope 枚举 (SKILL/BATTLE/GLOBAL) |
| `systems/combat_executor.gd` | **新增** — 唯一控制流入口，4个 `report_*()` 静态方法 + 3道防火墙 |
| `systems/combat_event_bus.gd` | **修改** — 新增 `MAX_DEPTH_HARD=5` 硬上限 |
| `skills/runtime/skill_executor.gd` | **修改** — `_emit_event()` 委托给 `CombatExecutor.report_cast()` |
| `skills/projectile.gd` | **修改** — `_emit_hit_event()` 委托给 `CombatExecutor.report_hit()` |
| `skills/flame_storm.gd` | **修改** — `_emit_hit_event()` 委托给 `CombatExecutor.report_hit()` |

| `entities/player/player.gd` | **修改** — `_setup_event_bus()` 同时创建 CombatExecutor |

### 三道防火墙

```
CombatExecutor._enforce_emit():
    │
    ├── 防火墙 1: MAX_EVENT_DEPTH = 3
    │   深度 > 3 → 直接拒绝（防止 ON_HIT→ON_DAMAGE→ON_HIT 死循环）
    │
    ├── 防火墙 2: MAX_CHAIN_LENGTH = 5
    │   链长 > 5 → 拒绝 + 重置计数（防止长时间链式反应）
    │
    └── 防火墙 3: Phase Gate
        当前不在 EVENT 或 POST 阶段 → 拒绝
        （Modifier 阶段发射事件 = 跨层调用 = 禁止）
```

### 系统分工（不可违反）

| 系统 | 允许 | 禁止 |
|---|---|---|
| **Modifier Pipeline** | 修改 `ctx.final_damage` | ❌ 发射事件 ❌ 控制流程 ❌ 副作用 |
| **Event Bus** | 广播通知 | ❌ 修改状态 ❌ 触发逻辑 |
| **Condition System** | 返回 `bool` | ❌ 修改 ctx ❌ 副作用 |
| **Effect Graph** | 产生行为 | ❌ 直接 emit ❌ 直接改 modifier |
| **CombatExecutor** | 全部控制流 | —（唯一权威） |

它的目标只有一个：

❗让你“看得见每一帧战斗是怎么被算出来的”

🧭 一、你要做的系统本质是什么？

不是 UI，不是工具，而是：

Combat Trace System（战斗执行追踪系统）
🧠 二、核心设计（最重要）

你必须在 CombatExecutor 里加一个“记录层”：

1️⃣ TraceEvent（最小记录单元）
class_name CombatTraceEvent

var phase              # 当前阶段
var type               # event / modifier / condition / graph
var name               # 发生了什么
var source             # 谁触发
var target             # 影响谁

var input_data         # 输入数据
var output_data        # 输出数据

var timestamp
var depth
2️⃣ CombatTrace（整条战斗链）
class_name CombatTrace

var events: Array[CombatTraceEvent]
var current_depth := 0
⚙️ 三、埋点方式（关键）

你只在一个地方加逻辑：

✔ CombatExecutor（唯一入口）

1️⃣ Phase 记录
trace.push_event("PHASE_ENTER", {
    "phase": current_phase
})
2️⃣ Modifier Pipeline 记录
trace.push_event("MODIFIER_APPLY", {
    "modifier": mod.name,
    "before": ctx.damage,
    "after": new_damage
})
3️⃣ Condition 记录
trace.push_event("CONDITION_CHECK", {
    "condition": cond.name,
    "result": true/false
})
4️⃣ Event 记录
trace.push_event("EVENT_EMIT", {
    "event": ev.type,
    "data": ev.data
})
5️⃣ Graph Node 记录
trace.push_event("GRAPH_NODE", {
    "node": node.name,
    "branch": true/false
})
🧱 四、核心结构（CombatExecutor 改造）
在 CombatExecutor 加：
var trace: CombatTrace
每次执行技能：
func execute_skill(skill, ctx):
    trace = CombatTrace.new()

    _run_pipeline(skill, ctx)
    _run_graph(skill, ctx)
    _emit_events(skill, ctx)

    CombatDebugger.store(trace)
🧠 五、CombatDebugger（核心管理器）
class_name CombatDebugger

static var traces: Array[CombatTrace]

static func store(trace):
    traces.append(trace)
提供三个能力：
1️⃣ 最近一次战斗
CombatDebugger.get_last_trace()
2️⃣ 回放

---

## ✅ Combat Trace System — 完成

### 核心能力：从"猜为什么137伤害"→"看到每一步"

```
❌ 没有 Trace                          ✅ 有 Trace
                                       
"火球伤害为什么是 137？"               按 ~ 打开 Debug UI:
  → 你只能猜                             1. 💥 resolve_damage: fireball  base=25
                                         2. 📊 StatScalingModifier @ FLAT: 25 → 45 (+20)
                                         3. 📊 TagMultiplierModifier @ MULTIPLY: 45 → 54 (+9)
                                         4. 📊 TagMultiplierModifier @ MULTIPLY: 54 → 81 (+27)
                                         5. 📊 TagMultiplierModifier @ MULTIPLY: 81 → 137 (+56)
                                         6. 📡 ON_CAST → player
                                         
                                         Chain: StatScalingModifier(+20) → TagMultiplierModifier(+9) → ...
```

### 新增文件 (4个)

| 文件 | 职责 |
|---|---|
| `systems/debug/combat_trace_event.gd` | 单条记录 — category / phase / input / output / metadata / depth |
| `systems/debug/combat_trace.gd` | 一次战斗链 — `record_modifier()` / `record_condition()` / `record_event()` / `get_damage_chain()` |
| `systems/debug/combat_debugger.gd` | 全局管理器 — `enabled` 开关 / `begin()` / `store()` / `summarize()` / `replay_step()` |
| `systems/debug/combat_debug_ui.gd` | 调试面板 — 按 `~` 切换，BBcode 彩色显示 |

### 埋点位置（3处，都在唯一入口）

```
SkillExecutor.execute()
  ├── CombatDebugger.begin()           ← 开始追踪
  ├── resolve_damage()
  │     └── 每个 modifier: before→after  ← 记录数值变化
  ├── CombatDebugger.store()           ← 存储追踪
  │
CombatExecutor._enforce_emit()
  ├── 防火墙拦截 → record_firewall()   ← 记录拦截原因
  └── 事件发射 → record_event()       ← 记录发射
```

### 三条工程原则

| 原则 | 实现 |
|---|---|
| **不影响逻辑** | 所有 `if trace:` 检查，`enabled=false` 时零开销 |
| **只读不污染** | Trace 只读取 ctx，从不写入 |
| **唯一入口** | 只在 CombatExecutor + SkillExecutor 记录 |

### 使用方式

```gdscript
# 1. 开启追踪（debug 模式自动开启）
CombatDebugger.enabled = true

# 2. 释放技能 → 自动记录

# 3. 查看最近一次
var trace := CombatDebugger.get_last()
print(CombatDebugger.summarize(trace))

# 4. 查询
var fire_traces := CombatDebugger.find_by_skill("fireball")
var stat_traces := CombatDebugger.find_using_modifier("StatScalingModifier")

# 5. 逐步回放
var step3 := CombatDebugger.replay_step(trace, 3)
print(step3.event_name, " → ", step3.output_data)

# 6. 游戏中按 ~ 键查看 GUI
```

### 系统进化路线图

```
✅ Level 1: SkillData             数据驱动技能
✅ Level 2: Modifier Pipeline     分阶段数值规则引擎
✅ Level 3: Combat Event Bus      全局发布/订阅
✅ Level 4: Condition System      智能条件过滤
✅ Level 5: Effect Graph          节点图组合引擎
✅ Level 6: Combat Trace          可观测性 + 回放  ← 你在这里
⬜ Level 7: DSL Formula Engine    数据驱动公式
```

func get_skill(id: String) -> SkillData:

class_name SkillLoadout
extends Resource

@export var left_hand: String

涓冦€丳layer鍙仛3浠朵簨锛堟渶缁堝舰鎬侊級
func _setup_skills():
    pool = load("res://skills/player_skill_pool.tres")
    pool.build()
    loadout = load("res://skills/default_loadout.tres")
    apply(loadout)

apply()
func apply(loadout):
    if loadout.left_hand:
        equip("left", pool.get_skill(loadout.left_hand))
    if loadout.right_hand:
        equip("right", pool.get_skill(loadout.right_hand))
    for i in range(loadout.slots.size()):
        equip_slot(i, pool.get_skill(loadout.slots[i]))

    var skill = resolve(slot)
    if not can_cast(skill):
        return
    executor.execute(skill, context)

class_name SkillPool
extends Resource
## 鎶€鑳芥睜 鈥?瀛樺偍鎵€鏈夊凡瀛︿細鐨勬妧鑳絓n## 姣忎釜鐜╁/NPC 鎷ユ湁涓€涓?SkillPool 瀹炰緥 (.tres)

@export var skills: Array[SkillData] = []


## 娣诲姞鎶€鑳藉埌姹犱腑
func add_skill(skill: SkillData) -> void:
	if not skill or has_skill(skill.skill_id):
		return
	skills.append(skill)


## 绉婚櫎鎶€鑳絓nfunc remove_skill(skill_id: String) -> void:
	for i in range(skills.size()):
		if skills[i] and skills[i].skill_id == skill_id:
			skills.remove_at(i)
			return


## 閫氳繃 id 鏌ユ壘
func get_skill(skill_id: String) -> SkillData:
	for s in skills:
		if s and s.skill_id == skill_id:
			return s
	return null


## 鏄惁宸插浼歕nfunc has_skill(skill_id: String) -> bool:
	return get_skill(skill_id) != null

## 鐑堢劙椋庢毚 鈥?AoE 鑼冨洿浼ゅ锛岀敓鎴愬悗绔嬪嵆浼ゅ鑼冨洿鍐呮墍鏈夋晫浜猴紝鐭殏寤惰繜鍚庤嚜姣乗n
@export var damage: int = 30

func _ready() -> void:
	# 纭繚纰版挒褰㈢姸

	body_entered.connect(_on_body_entered)

	# 鐭殏寤惰繜鍚庤嚜姣乗n	await get_tree().create_timer(lifetime).timeout
	queue_free()

	caster = c


func _on_body_entered(body: Node2D) -> void:
	if body == caster:
		return
	if body.has_method("take_damage"):
		body.take_damage(damage)

class_name Projectile
extends Area2D
## 鎶曞皠鐗╁熀绫?鈥?鎵€鏈夐琛屾妧鑳斤紙鐏悆銆佹殫褰卞脊銆佸啺绠瓑锛夌户鎵挎绫籠n## 瀛愮被瑕嗗啓 _apply_visual() 璁剧疆澶栬锛屾垨瑕嗗啓 @export 榛樿鍊糪n
@export var speed: float = 300.0
@export var damage: int = 10
@export var lifetime: float = 3.0
@export var collision_radius: float = 8.0

var direction: Vector2 = Vector2.DOWN
var caster: Node2D = null


func _ready() -> void:
	# 瀛愮被瑙嗚瀹氬埗锛堝繀椤诲湪褰㈢姸鍒涘缓涔嬪墠锛屽厑璁歌鍐?collision_radius锛塡n	_apply_visual()

	# 纭繚纰版挒褰㈢姸
	var shape_node = $CollisionShape2D
	if shape_node and shape_node.shape == null:
		var circle = CircleShape2D.new()
		circle.radius = collision_radius
		shape_node.shape = circle

	# 杩炴帴淇″彿
	body_entered.connect(_on_body_entered)
	area_entered.connect(_on_area_entered)
	add_to_group("projectile")

	# 鑷姩閿€姣乗n	await get_tree().create_timer(lifetime).timeout
	queue_free()


## 瀛愮被瑕嗗啓锛氳缃?modulate / 绮掑瓙 / 缂╂斁绛夎瑙夊睘鎬nfunc _apply_visual() -> void:
	pass


func set_direction(dir: Vector2) -> void:
	direction = dir.normalized()
	rotation = direction.angle()


func _physics_process(delta: float) -> void:
	global_position += direction * speed * delta


func set_caster(c: Node2D) -> void:
	caster = c


func _on_body_entered(body: Node2D) -> void:
	if body == caster:
		return
	if body.has_method("take_damage"):
		body.take_damage(damage)
	queue_free()


func _on_area_entered(area: Area2D) -> void:
	if area.owner == caster:
		return
	if area.is_in_group("projectile"):
		return
	if area.has_method("take_damage"):
		area.take_damage(damage)
	queue_free()

extends CharacterBody2D
class_name Player

## 鈹€鈹€ 绉诲姩鍩虹鍊硷紙鏈€缁堥€熷害 = 鍩虹 + 鏁忔嵎鍔犳垚锛?鈹€鈹€
@export var base_move_speed: float = 300.0

## 鈹€鈹€ 鑳屽寘 鈹€鈹€
@export var inventory: Inventory
var inventory_panel: InventoryPanel
var skill_pool_ui: SkillPoolUI = null
var _skill_pool: SkillPool = null

## 鈹€鈹€ 璋冭瘯 鈹€鈹€
@export var debug_items: bool = false

## 鈹€鈹€ 淇″彿锛圚UD 璁㈤槄锛?鈹€鈹€
signal health_changed(current_hp: int, max_hp: int)
signal mp_changed(current_mp: int, max_mp: int)
signal died
signal skill_cooldown_changed(remaining: float, total: float)

## 鈹€鈹€ 鏈濆悜 鈹€鈹€
var facing_direction: Vector2 = Vector2.DOWN

## 鈹€鈹€ 鑺傜偣寮曠敤 鈹€鈹€
@onready var sprite: Sprite2D = $Sprite2D
@onready var collision_shape: CollisionShape2D = $CollisionShape2D
@onready var animation_player: AnimationPlayer = $AnimationPlayer
@onready var attack_hitbox: Area2D = $AttackHitbox
@onready var attack_hitbox_shape: CollisionShape2D = $AttackHitbox/CollisionShape2D
@onready var health_component: HealthComponent = $HealthComponent
@onready var combat_component: CombatComponent = $CombatComponent
@onready var skill_manager: SkillManager = $SkillManager
@onready var stats_component: StatsComponent = $StatsComponent
var mana_component: ManaComponent = null

## 鈹€鈹€ 寰呴噴鏀剧殑鎶€鑳芥潵婧愶紙"slot_N"锛屼粎蹇嵎閿敤锛?鈹€鈹€
var pending_skill_source: String = ""
## 鈹€鈹€ 鐬勫噯鐘舵€侊紙璺ㄧ姸鎬佷繚鎸侊級 鈹€鈹€
var aiming_sources: Dictionary = {}
var cancel_aim: bool = false
## 鈹€鈹€ UI 闈㈡澘鎵撳紑鏃堕樆姝㈡父鎴忚緭鍏?鈹€鈹€
var ui_blocked: bool = false
## 鈹€鈹€ 鐬勫噯鎸囩ず鍣?鈹€鈹€
var _aim_line: Line2D = null
var _aim_dot: Sprite2D = null
var _aim_distance: float = 60.0

## 鈹€鈹€ 杩愯鏃剁Щ鍔ㄩ€熷害锛堝熀纭€ + 鏁忔嵎鍔犳垚锛?鈹€鈹€
var move_speed: float = 300.0

## 鈹€鈹€ 鐘舵€佹満 鈹€鈹€
var state_machine: Node


func _ready() -> void:
	add_to_group("player")

	# 韬綋纰版挒褰㈢姸
	collision_shape.shape = load("res://entities/player/player_body_shape.tres")

	# MP 缁勪欢锛堝厛鍒涘缓锛宊apply_stats 渚濊禆瀹冿級
	if not mana_component:
		_create_mana_component()
	mana_component.mp_changed.connect(_on_mp_changed)

	# 灞炴€х郴缁焅n	_apply_stats()
	stats_component.stat_changed.connect(_on_stat_changed)

	# 鍒濆鍖栫粍浠禱n	health_component.setup(collision_shape)
	combat_component.setup(self, attack_hitbox, attack_hitbox_shape, animation_player)

	# 鎶€鑳藉垵濮嬪寲
	_setup_skills()

	# 杞彂缁勪欢淇″彿 鈫?Player 淇″彿
	health_component.health_changed.connect(_on_health_changed)
	health_component.died.connect(_on_died)
	skill_manager.cooldown_changed.connect(_on_skill_cooldown)

	# 鐬勫噯鎸囩ず鍣╘n	_setup_aim_indicator()

	# 鐘舵€佹満
	_setup_state_machine()

	# 瑙嗚
	if sprite and sprite.texture:
		sprite.scale = Vector2(0.5, 0.5)
	sprite.z_as_relative = false
	sprite.z_index = 10

	# 鑳屽寘闈㈡澘
	call_deferred("_setup_inventory_panel")

	# 鎶€鑳芥睜闈㈡澘
	call_deferred("_setup_skill_pool_ui")


## 鈹€鈹€ 灞炴€х郴缁?鈹€鈹€

## 杩借釜涓婁竴娆″睘鎬ф帹瀵煎€硷紝鐢ㄤ簬澧為噺搴旂敤锛堜繚鐣欒澶囧姞鎴愪笉琚鐩栵級
var _last_stat_hp: int = 0
var _last_stat_mp: int = 0
var _last_stat_dmg: int = 0
var _last_stat_speed: float = 0.0


func _apply_stats() -> void:
	stats_component._recalculate_all()

	var new_hp := 50 + stats_component.max_hp_bonus
	var new_mp := stats_component.max_mana
	var new_dmg := 10 + stats_component.physical_damage
	var new_speed := base_move_speed + stats_component.move_speed_bonus

	if _last_stat_hp == 0:
		# 棣栨璋冪敤锛氱粷瀵硅祴鍊糪n		health_component.max_hp = new_hp
		mana_component.max_mp = new_mp
		combat_component.attack_damage = new_dmg
		move_speed = new_speed
	else:
		# 鍚庣画璋冪敤锛氬彧搴旂敤宸€硷紝淇濈暀瑁呭绛夊閮ㄥ姞鎴怽n		health_component.max_hp += new_hp - _last_stat_hp
		mana_component.max_mp += new_mp - _last_stat_mp
		combat_component.attack_damage += new_dmg - _last_stat_dmg
		move_speed += new_speed - _last_stat_speed

	health_component.hp = clampi(health_component.hp, 1, health_component.max_hp)
	mana_component.mp = clampi(mana_component.mp, 0, mana_component.max_mp)

	_last_stat_hp = new_hp
	_last_stat_mp = new_mp
	_last_stat_dmg = new_dmg
	_last_stat_speed = new_speed


func _on_stat_changed(_stat_name: String, _new_value: int) -> void:
	_apply_stats()
	health_changed.emit(health_component.hp, health_component.max_hp)
	mp_changed.emit(mana_component.mp, mana_component.max_mp)


## 鈹€鈹€ 榄旇兘 鈹€鈹€

func _create_mana_component() -> void:
	var mc := ManaComponent.new()
	mc.name = "ManaComponent"
	add_child(mc)
	mana_component = mc


func _on_mp_changed(current_mp: int, max_mp: int) -> void:
	mp_changed.emit(current_mp, max_mp)


func use_mp(amount: int) -> bool:
	return mana_component.use_mp(amount)


func restore_mp(amount: int) -> void:
	mana_component.restore_mp(amount)


## 鈹€鈹€ 鎶€鑳藉垵濮嬪寲 鈹€鈹€

func _setup_skills() -> void:
	_skill_pool = load("res://skills/player_skill_pool.tres") as SkillPool
	if not _skill_pool:
		_skill_pool = SkillPool.new()

	# 纭繚鐏悆鍦ㄦ睜涓璡n	if not _skill_pool.has_skill("fireball"):
		var fireball := load("res://skills/fireball_data.tres") as SkillData
		if fireball:
			fireball.projectile_scene = load("res://skills/fireball.tscn")
			fireball.damage = 25 + stats_component.magic_damage
			fireball.mp_cost = 15
			fireball.skill_type = SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE
			_skill_pool.add_skill(fireball)

	# 鍔犲叆鍐伴湝鎶ょ浘銆佺儓鐒伴鏆淬€佹殫褰辨
	for sid in ["ice_armor", "flame_storm", "shadow_step"]:
		if not _skill_pool.has_skill(sid):
			var skill := load("res://skills/%s_data.tres" % sid) as SkillData
			if skill:
				if sid == "flame_storm":
					skill.cast_distance = 150.0  # AoE 鏂芥硶璺濈
				_skill_pool.add_skill(skill)

	# 瑁呭锛氬乏鎵嬪啺鐢层€佸彸鎵嬬伀鐞冦€侀敭1鐑堢劙椋庢毚銆侀敭2鏆楀奖姝n	skill_manager.equip_hand("left", _skill_pool.get_skill("ice_armor"))
	skill_manager.equip_hand("right", _skill_pool.get_skill("fireball"))
	skill_manager.equip_slot(0, _skill_pool.get_skill("flame_storm"))
	skill_manager.equip_slot(1, _skill_pool.get_skill("shadow_step"))


## 鈹€鈹€ 淇″彿杞彂 鈹€鈹€

func _on_health_changed(current_hp: int, max_hp: int) -> void:
	health_changed.emit(current_hp, max_hp)


func _on_died() -> void:
	set_process(false)
	set_physics_process(false)
	print("馃拃 鐜╁姝讳骸锛乗")
	died.emit()


func _on_skill_cooldown(_source: String, remaining: float, total: float) -> void:
	skill_cooldown_changed.emit(remaining, total)


## 鈹€鈹€ 鐘舵€佹満 鈹€鈹€

func _setup_state_machine() -> void:
	state_machine = $StateMachine
	if not state_machine.get_script():
		return

	for child in state_machine.get_children():
		if child.has_method("enter") and child.get("entity") != self:
			child.set("entity", self)


## 鈹€鈹€ 鑳屽寘 鈹€鈹€

func _setup_inventory_panel() -> void:
	var panel = get_tree().current_scene.get_node_or_null("InventoryPanel")
	if not panel:
		var panel_scene = load("res://ui/inventory_panel.tscn") as PackedScene
		if panel_scene:
			panel = panel_scene.instantiate()
			panel.name = "InventoryPanel"
			get_tree().current_scene.add_child.call_deferred(panel)

	if panel and panel is InventoryPanel:
		inventory_panel = panel
		if not inventory:
			inventory = load("res://items/player_inventory.tres") as Inventory
		inventory_panel.setup(inventory, $EquipmentManager)
		if debug_items:
			_add_test_items()


func _setup_skill_pool_ui() -> void:
	var ui := SkillPoolUI.new()
	ui.name = "SkillPoolUI"
	get_tree().current_scene.add_child.call_deferred(ui)
	ui.setup(_skill_pool, skill_manager)


func _add_test_items() -> void:
	if not inventory:
		return
	var helmet = load("res://items/examples/iron_helmet.tres")
	var armor = load("res://items/examples/leather_armor.tres")
	var boots = load("res://items/examples/iron_boots.tres")
	inventory.add_item(helmet, 1)
	inventory.add_item(armor, 1)
	inventory.add_item(boots, 1)
	print("馃帓 娴嬭瘯瑁呭宸叉坊鍔犲埌鑳屽寘")


## 鈹€鈹€ 鐬勫噯鎸囩ず鍣?鈹€鈹€

func _setup_aim_indicator() -> void:
	_aim_line = Line2D.new()
	_aim_line.name = "AimLine"
	_aim_line.width = 2.0
	_aim_line.default_color = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.5)
	_aim_line.z_index = 20
	_aim_line.visible = false
	add_child(_aim_line)

	_aim_dot = Sprite2D.new()
	_aim_dot.name = "AimDot"
	_aim_dot.texture = load("res://icon.svg")
	_aim_dot.scale = Vector2(0.08, 0.08)
	_aim_dot.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.6)
	_aim_dot.z_index = 20
	_aim_dot.visible = false
	add_child(_aim_dot)


func _input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
	if event is InputEventMouseButton:
		if (event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_WHEEL_UP or event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_WHEEL_DOWN) and event.pressed:
			if aiming_sources.size() > 0:
				cancel_aim = true


func _process(_delta: float) -> void:
	if not _aim_dot or not _aim_dot.visible:
		return
	if _aim_line.visible:
		var dir := get_mouse_direction()
		_aim_line.points = PackedVector2Array([Vector2.ZERO, dir * _aim_distance])
		_aim_dot.global_position = global_position + dir * _aim_distance
	else:
		_aim_dot.global_position = global_position


func show_aim(_source: String, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	if not skill or not _aim_line or not _aim_dot:
		return

	var color := _aim_color(skill.skill_type)

	match skill.skill_type:
		SkillData.SkillType.BUFF:
			_aim_line.visible = false
			_aim_dot.modulate = color
			_aim_dot.scale = Vector2(0.5, 0.5)
			_aim_dot.visible = true

		SkillData.SkillType.AOE:
			_aim_distance = skill.cast_distance
			_aim_line.default_color = color
			_aim_line.visible = true
			_aim_dot.modulate = color
			_aim_dot.scale = Vector2(skill.aoe_radius / 80.0, skill.aoe_radius / 80.0)
			_aim_dot.visible = true

		SkillData.SkillType.DASH:
			_aim_distance = skill.dash_distance
			_aim_line.default_color = color
			_aim_line.visible = true
			_aim_dot.modulate = color
			_aim_dot.scale = Vector2(0.08, 0.08)
			_aim_dot.visible = true

		_:
			_aim_distance = 60.0
			_aim_line.default_color = color
			_aim_line.visible = true
			_aim_dot.modulate = color
			_aim_dot.scale = Vector2(0.08, 0.08)
			_aim_dot.visible = true


func _aim_color(skill_type: int) -> Color:
	match skill_type:
		SkillData.SkillType.BUFF:       return Color(0.3, 0.7, 1.0, 0.5)
		SkillData.SkillType.AOE:        return Color(1.0, 0.3, 0.1, 0.6)
		SkillData.SkillType.DASH:       return Color(0.3, 1.0, 0.5, 0.6)
		SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE: return Color(1.0, 0.5, 0.2, 0.7)
	return Color.WHITE


func hide_aim() -> void:
	if _aim_line: _aim_line.visible = false
	if _aim_dot: _aim_dot.visible = false


## 鈹€鈹€ 鍏紑 API 鈹€鈹€

func get_mouse_direction() -> Vector2:
	return (get_global_mouse_position() - global_position).normalized()


func perform_melee_attack() -> void:
	combat_component.perform_melee_attack()


## 閲婃斁宸︽墜鎴栧彸鎵嬫妧鑳絓nfunc cast_hand(hand: String) -> bool:
	var ok := skill_manager.use_hand(hand, self, get_mouse_direction())
	if ok and animation_player.has_animation("skill"):
		animation_player.play("skill")
	return ok


## 閲婃斁蹇嵎閿Ы浣嶆妧鑳絓nfunc cast_slot(idx: int) -> bool:
	var ok := skill_manager.use_slot(idx, self, get_mouse_direction())
	if ok and animation_player.has_animation("skill"):
		animation_player.play("skill")
	return ok


func take_damage(amount: int) -> void:
	health_component.take_damage(amount)


func heal(amount: int) -> void:
	health_component.heal(amount)

extends CharacterBody2D
class_name Enemy

## 鈹€鈹€ 灞炴€?鈹€鈹€
@export var max_hp: int = 30
@export var move_speed: float = 120.0
@export var detect_range: float = 200.0
@export var attack_range: float = 55.0
@export var attack_damage: int = 8
@export var attack_cooldown: float = 1.0

## 鈹€鈹€ 鎺夎惤 鈹€鈹€
@export var drop_scene: PackedScene

## 鈹€鈹€ 瑙嗚棰勮 (0=鍝ㄥ叺馃煝, 1=澹叺馃敶, 2=鍧﹀厠馃煟) 鈹€鈹€
@export var enemy_type: int = 1:
	set(v):
		enemy_type = v
		_apply_preset(v)

const PRESETS: Array[Dictionary] = [
	{"name": "鍝ㄥ叺", "color": Color(0.3, 0.9, 0.3, 1), "scale": Vector2(0.25, 0.25)},
	{"name": "澹叺", "color": Color(0.8, 0.25, 0.25, 1), "scale": Vector2(0.4, 0.4)},
	{"name": "鍧﹀厠", "color": Color(0.6, 0.2, 0.7, 1), "scale": Vector2(0.55, 0.55)},
]

## 鈹€鈹€ 棰勮灞炴€ц〃锛堝摠鍏?澹叺/鍧﹀厠锛?鈹€鈹€
const PRESET_STATS: Array[Dictionary] = [
	{"strength": 5,  "intelligence": 5,  "agility": 15, "endurance": 5},   # 鍝ㄥ叺锛氶珮鏁忔嵎
	{"strength": 10, "intelligence": 8,  "agility": 10, "endurance": 10},  # 澹叺锛氬潎琛n	{"strength": 15, "intelligence": 5,  "agility": 5,  "endurance": 15},  # 鍧﹀厠锛氶珮鍔涜€怽n]

var enemy_color: Color = Color.RED
var enemy_scale: Vector2 = Vector2(0.4, 0.4)
var enemy_name: String = "鏁屼汉"

## 鈹€鈹€ 杩愯鏃?鈹€鈹€
var player: Player = null
var attack_ready: bool = true

signal died

@onready var health_component: HealthComponent = $HealthComponent
@onready var skill_manager: SkillManager = $SkillManager
@onready var stats_component: StatsComponent = $StatsComponent


func _ready() -> void:
	add_to_group("enemy")
	# 纰版挒褰㈢姸
	$CollisionShape2D.shape = load("res://entities/enemy/enemy_body_shape.tres")

	# 搴旂敤棰勮灞炴€n	_apply_preset_stats(enemy_type)

	# 鐢熷懡鍊肩粍浠禱n	health_component.setup($CollisionShape2D)
	health_component.regen_rate = 0.0
	health_component.died.connect(_on_died)
	_apply_stats_to_health()

	# 鎶€鑳絓n	var bolt_data := load("res://skills/shadow_bolt_data.tres") as SkillData
	if bolt_data:
		bolt_data.skill_type = SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE
		bolt_data.projectile_scene = load("res://skills/shadow_bolt.tscn")
		bolt_data.scene = bolt_data.projectile_scene  # 鍏煎
		bolt_data.projectile_speed = 250.0
		bolt_data.damage = 10 + stats_component.magic_damage
		skill_manager.equip_hand("right", bolt_data)

	# 瑙嗚
	_apply_preset(enemy_type)
	_apply_visuals()

	# 鐘舵€佹満
	_setup_state_machine()

	call_deferred("_find_player")


## 鈹€鈹€ 灞炴€?鈹€鈹€

func _apply_preset_stats(type_idx: int) -> void:
	if type_idx < 0 or type_idx >= PRESET_STATS.size():
		return
	var s = PRESET_STATS[type_idx]
	stats_component.strength = s["strength"]
	stats_component.intelligence = s["intelligence"]
	stats_component.agility = s["agility"]
	stats_component.endurance = s["endurance"]
	stats_component._recalculate_all()


func _apply_stats_to_health() -> void:
	health_component.max_hp = 20 + stats_component.max_hp_bonus
	health_component.hp = health_component.max_hp
	move_speed = 80 + stats_component.move_speed_bonus
	attack_damage = 3 + stats_component.physical_damage


## 鈹€鈹€ 瑙嗚 鈹€鈹€

func _apply_preset(type_idx: int) -> void:
	if type_idx < 0 or type_idx >= PRESETS.size():
		return
	var p = PRESETS[type_idx]
	enemy_name = p["name"]
	enemy_color = p["color"]
	enemy_scale = p["scale"]


func _apply_visuals() -> void:
	var spr = $Sprite2D
	spr.modulate = enemy_color
	spr.scale = enemy_scale


func _flash_damage() -> void:
	var spr = $Sprite2D
	spr.modulate = Color.WHITE
	await get_tree().create_timer(0.1).timeout
	spr.modulate = enemy_color


## 鈹€鈹€ 鐘舵€佹満 鈹€鈹€

func _setup_state_machine() -> void:
	var sm = $StateMachine
	if not sm.get_script():
		return
	for child in sm.get_children():
		if child.has_method("enter") and child.get("entity") != self:
			child.set("entity", self)


func _find_player() -> void:
	player = get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("player") as Player
	if not player:
		await get_tree().create_timer(0.5).timeout
		_find_player()


## 鈹€鈹€ AI 杈呭姪 鈹€鈹€

func get_player_direction() -> Vector2:
	if not player:
		return Vector2.ZERO
	return (player.global_position - global_position).normalized()


func distance_to_player() -> float:
	if not player:
		return INF
	return global_position.distance_to(player.global_position)


## 鈹€鈹€ 鍙椾激/姝讳骸 鈹€鈹€

func take_damage(amount: int) -> void:
	_flash_damage()
	health_component.take_damage(amount)


func _on_died() -> void:
	# 鍑绘潃濂栧姳缁忛獙
	if player and player.stats_component:
		player.stats_component.add_experience(30 + stats_component.level * 10)
	_spawn_drop()
	died.emit()
	queue_free()


func _spawn_drop() -> void:
	if not drop_scene:
		if randf() < 0.5:
			drop_scene = load("res://pickups/health_pickup.tscn")
		else:
			drop_scene = load("res://pickups/mana_pickup.tscn")

	if not drop_scene:
		return
	var drop = drop_scene.instantiate()
	get_tree().current_scene.add_child.call_deferred(drop)
	drop.global_position = global_position


## 鈹€鈹€ 鏀诲嚮 鈹€鈹€

func perform_attack() -> void:
	if not attack_ready or not player:
		return
	attack_ready = false
	player.take_damage(attack_damage)
	await get_tree().create_timer(attack_cooldown).timeout
	attack_ready = true

class_name Buff
extends Resource
## Buff/琚姩鏁堟灉 鈥?鍙瑁呭銆佹妧鑳姐€佹秷鑰楀搧绛変换浣曠郴缁熷鐢╘n##
## duration = 0 琛ㄧず姘镐箙锛堣澶囩被 Buff锛塡n## tick_interval = 0 琛ㄧず涓嶈Е鍙?tick

## 鏄剧ず鍚嶇О
@export var display_name: String = ""

## 鍥炬爣
@export var icon: Texture2D

## 鎸佺画鏃堕棿锛堢锛?=姘镐箙锛塡n@export var duration: float = 0.0

## tick 闂撮殧锛堢锛?=涓嶈Е鍙戯級
@export var tick_interval: float = 0.0

## 灞炴€у姞鎴愶紙鍥哄畾鍊硷級
## 鏀寔: strength/intelligence/agility/endurance (涓诲睘鎬? StatsComponent)
##       max_hp (HealthComponent), move_speed (Player), attack_damage (CombatComponent)
@export var stat_modifiers: Dictionary = {}

## 灞炴€х櫨鍒嗘瘮鍔犳垚锛堝 {"atk": 0.1} = +10% 鏀诲嚮鍔涳級
@export var stat_multipliers: Dictionary = {}

## tick 鏃跺洖澶?HP
@export var tick_heal: int = 0

## 鈹€鈹€ 涓诲睘鎬у悕闆嗗悎 鈹€鈹€
const PRIMARY_STATS: Array[String] = ["strength", "intelligence", "agility", "endurance"]


## 搴旂敤姝?Buff 鍒扮洰鏍囧疄浣揬nfunc apply_to(entity: Node) -> void:
	if not entity:
		return
	for stat_name in stat_modifiers:
		_apply_stat(entity, stat_name, stat_modifiers[stat_name])


## 浠庣洰鏍囧疄浣撶Щ闄ゆ Buff
func remove_from(entity: Node) -> void:
	if not entity:
		return
	for stat_name in stat_modifiers:
		_apply_stat(entity, stat_name, -stat_modifiers[stat_name])


## 搴旂敤鍗曚釜灞炴€т慨鏀筡nfunc _apply_stat(entity: Node, stat_name: String, amount: float) -> void:
	var amt := int(amount)
	if amt == 0:
		return

	# 1. 涓诲睘鎬?鈫?StatsComponent.modify_stat锛堜細瑙﹀彂 _apply_stats锛塡n	if stat_name in PRIMARY_STATS:
		var stats := _get_stats_component(entity)
		if stats:
			stats.modify_stat(stat_name, amt)
		return

	# 2. max_hp 鈫?HealthComponent
	if stat_name == "max_hp":
		var hp := entity.get_node_or_null("HealthComponent") as HealthComponent
		if hp:
			hp.max_hp += amt
			hp.hp = clampi(hp.hp + amt, 1, hp.max_hp)
			hp.health_changed.emit(hp.hp, hp.max_hp)
		return

	# 3. attack_damage 鈫?CombatComponent
	if stat_name == "attack_damage":
		var combat := entity.get_node_or_null("CombatComponent") as CombatComponent
		if combat:
			combat.attack_damage += amt
		return

	# 4. 鐩存帴灞炴€э紙濡?move_speed, base_move_speed 鍦?Player 涓婏級
	if stat_name in entity:
		entity.set(stat_name, entity.get(stat_name) + amt)


## 鏌ユ壘瀹炰綋涓婄殑 StatsComponent
func _get_stats_component(entity: Node) -> StatsComponent:
	if entity is Player:
		return entity.stats_component
	return entity.get_node_or_null("StatsComponent") as StatsComponent
